title: T-044 — QA-009a ncr_detail page + ncr_close_modal hook (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-044 — QA-009a ncr_detail page + ncr_close_modal hook

PRD: docs/prd/09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.3 QUA-105 (NCR detail P1 promotion), §8.5 traceability, §11.4 V-QA-NCR-005/006, §5.3 signature evidence
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:126-283 (ncr_detail) + quality/modals.jsx:385-466 (ncr_close_modal)

## Goal
Two-column NCR detail page with main investigation form + sidebar (status workflow, linked records, activity timeline) + sticky action bar, opening ncr_close_modal for close flow. 1:1 parity vs prototype. Renders SignedBanner immutability when status='closed'.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/[id]/page.tsx (RSC) loads NCR + linked records + activity (ncr_events) in parallel.
2. Main column: detection summary, description (read-only after submit), root cause Textarea + root_cause_category Select (rcCat ← T-042), immediate_action Textarea, CAPA P2 placeholder Card (disabled overlay, BL-QA-01).
3. Sidebar: status workflow (server-driven state machine; Next/Close buttons → Server Actions), linked records list (hold/inspection/ccp_deviation/complaint), activity timeline from ncr_events.
4. Sticky action bar bottom: Save autosave on blur (Server Action), Close NCR → opens ncr_close_modal (T-046).
5. SignedBanner shown when closed_at IS NOT NULL; all editable fields locked.
6. Overdue banner top: server-computed (response_due_at < now()).

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:126-283` (ncr_detail).
Parity checklist (verify all):
- 2-col grid 1fr 380px
- Main: detection card + description + root cause Textarea + rcCat Select + immediate_action + CAPA placeholder (P2 opacity-50)
- Sidebar: status workflow card + linked records list + activity timeline (shadcn Timeline or custom ul with dot connectors)
- Sticky bottom action bar (Close NCR + Save)
- SignedBanner when closed (Alert variant=success with lock icon)
- Overdue banner when overdue (Alert variant=destructive)

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/NcrDetailClient.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/NcrStatusWorkflow.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/NcrActivityTimeline.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/__tests__/NcrDetailClient.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:126-283 — parity on structure, visuals, interaction (RTL + checklist)
2. Given status='closed', when page renders, then SignedBanner shows + root cause Textarea is read-only + status workflow Close button is hidden
3. Given critical NCR not yet closed, when user clicks Close NCR action, then ncr_close_modal opens with dual-sign layout (two ESignBlock components rendered)
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: NcrDetailClient.test.tsx asserting parity + closed immutability + critical opens dual-sign before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test NcrDetailClient'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow client to edit fields when closed_at IS NOT NULL — read-only Server-rendered view (translation-notes-quality §QA-009a)
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to RSC + shadcn
- Do not skip overdue banner (server-computed)
- Do not couple to ncr_close_modal internals — open via URL searchParam state for modal (?modal=close)

pipeline_inputs.description: NCR detail page (RSC + sidebar workflow + activity timeline + sticky action bar) with ncr_close_modal hook, 1:1 prototype parity. SignedBanner immutability on close.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component loads NCR + ncr_events + linked records in parallel. 2-col layout (1fr 380px). Main: detection summary, description (locked after submit), rootCause Textarea + rootCauseCategory Select (rcCat from T-042), immediate_action Textarea, CAPA P2 placeholder Card (disabled overlay per BL-QA-01). Sidebar: status workflow (Next/Close buttons → Server Actions), linked records (hold/inspection/ccp_deviation/complaint), activity timeline. Sticky action bar (Save autosave on blur + Close NCR opens ncr_close_modal T-046). SignedBanner Alert + immutability when closed_at IS NOT NULL. Overdue banner top when response_due_at < now(). Translation-notes red-lines: status workflow server-driven; activity events from ncr_events table; CAPA P2 disabled card has data-state='disabled' attribute. Anchor: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:126-283.
out_of_scope: Do not implement CAPA workflow (P2 Epic 8G, BL-QA-01)
Do not modify NCR Server Actions (T-038)
acceptance_criteria: Given the NCR detail page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:126-283 (ncr_detail), then it matches on structural parity (2-col grid 1fr 380px, main investigation form + sidebar status workflow + linked records list + activity timeline + sticky action bar), visual parity (shadcn Card/Textarea/Select/Alert/Button only, CAPA P2 placeholder with opacity-50), and interaction parity (Save autosave on blur via Server Action, Close NCR opens ncr_close_modal via ?modal=close URL state, status workflow Next/Close buttons trigger Server Actions) — verified by RTL render plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given status='closed' and closed_at IS NOT NULL, when page renders, then SignedBanner is shown, root cause Textarea is read-only (disabled), and status workflow Close button is hidden
Given a critical-severity NCR not yet closed, when user clicks Close NCR action, then ncr_close_modal opens with two ESignBlock components (dual-sign layout) per V-QA-NCR-006

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: NcrDetailClient.test.tsx asserting parity (2-col + sidebar + sticky bar) + closed immutability + critical dual-sign hook + overdue banner
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow client-side edit when closed_at IS NOT NULL — Server Component renders read-only variant (translation-notes-quality §QA-009a + audit B §3)
Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to RSC + shadcn
Do not skip overdue banner (server-computed boolean prop)
Do not couple to modal internals — URL searchParam ?modal=close for modal open state
Do not invent client-only status workflow — Server Actions own transitions
